text:
If a post-event replay is familiar, this social anxiety pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Pick one true, simple thing to say, say it first. And let the room fill in the rest. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. People remember how a conversation felt far less precisely than you think they do.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on social_anxiety (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
acceptance_layer: system working — Metricool dry-run only (not live publish)
